hooks.command: file=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_OUTPUT" | grep -o '"file_path":"[^"]*"' | head -1 | cut -d'"' -f4); if [ -n "$file" ] && echo "$file" | grep -q '\.js$'; then cd /home/inuka/PokeGacha && node --check "$file" 2>&1 && echo "syntax OK: $file" || echo "syntax ERROR: $file"; fi
echo '[Claude Code] 入力待ちです' >> /tmp/claude-notify.log
